name: bdfl
description: Managed parallel agents with isolated Git worktrees

interface.shortDescription: Managed agents with safe Git integration
interface.longDescription: BDFL protects the main context by coordinating parallel agents in isolated worktrees, routing questions through an inbox, and validating work before integration.
defaultPrompt: Use $bdfl:bdfl to turn BDFL orchestration on, or pass off to deactivate it.
Use $bdfl:models to inspect and choose the exact run model.
Use $bdfl:plans to review plan versions and diffs.
Use $bdfl:agents to inspect and manage BDFL agents.
